# AxionOS Third-Party Notice Bundle (V1)

This bundle provides required attribution and notice references for third-party components distributed with AxionOS.

## notepad_plus_plus
- Component: Notepad++
- License family: GPL-3.0-or-later
- Notice coverage: copyright, license_text, no_warranty

## libreoffice_suite
- Component: LibreOffice
- License family: MPL-2.0 and LGPL-3.0
- Notice coverage: copyright, license_text

## gimp_engine
- Component: GIMP
- License family: GPL-3.0-or-later
- Notice coverage: copyright, license_text, no_warranty

## inkscape_engine
- Component: Inkscape
- License family: GPL-3.0-or-later
- Notice coverage: copyright, license_text, no_warranty

## scribus_engine
- Component: Scribus
- License family: GPL-2.0-or-later
- Notice coverage: copyright, license_text, no_warranty
